items.name: Web fetch content boundaries (structural tags + system prompt)
validation: content-safety.ts exports wrapFetchedContent, wrapMemoryContext, UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_INSTRUCTION ✓
web_fetch output wrapped in <fetched_content source="..."> tags ✓
System prompt includes UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_INSTRUCTION (content boundaries) ✓

items.name: Extraction model default in serve mode
validation: createWebTools accepts isRemoteSession param ✓
Remote sessions default to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 for extraction ✓
isRemote derived from !!sandboxPolicy in createAgentServers ✓

items.name: Memory content tagging (CONTEXT.md as untrusted)
validation: Memory context wrapped in <memory_context> tags via wrapMemoryContext() ✓
Label in system prompt: 'accumulated context from previous sessions' ✓

items.name: DNS rebinding / redirect hardening + IPv6 + IP encoding
validation: IPv4-mapped IPv6 dotted form (::ffff:127.0.0.1) normalized and blocked ✓
IPv4-mapped IPv6 hex-short form (::ffff:7f00:1) normalized and blocked ✓ [P0 review fix]
Decimal IP (2130706433) parsed via parseExoticIp and blocked ✓
Octal IP (0177.0.0.1) parsed via parseExoticIp and blocked ✓
Hex IP (0x7f000001) parsed via parseExoticIp and blocked ✓
Protocol validation rejects file://, data://, ftp:// ✓ [P1 review fix]
dns.lookup result null-checked ✓ [P1 review fix]
DNS pinning via URL rewrite removed (broke HTTPS TLS) — validate-then-fetch ✓ [P0 review fix]
safeFetch validates each redirect hop against SSRF blocklist + egress ✓
56 url-safety tests cover all bypass vectors incl. end-to-end IPv6 ✓

items.name: A2A server authentication
validation: JSON-RPC POST endpoint requires bearer token via bearerAuth middleware ✓
Agent card GET endpoint remains public (needed for discovery) ✓
Unauthenticated requests get 401 with 'Authentication required' ✓
Invalid tokens get 401 with 'Invalid token' ✓

items.name: Deprecate WS query param token
validation: extractWsToken returns { token, source } instead of bare string ✓
Query param token still works but logs deprecation via logger.warn ✓
Deprecation warning sent to client as { type: 'warning', code: 'token_query_deprecated' } ✓

items.name: Drop raw token from connectedClients
validation: connectedClients Map type changed to { user, tokenHash } ✓
Raw token hashed via hashToken() before storage ✓
Token revocation uses hash comparison against access.yaml entries ✓
No raw token held in memory after auth ✓

items.name: Per-user stderr logging
validation: resolveRemoteAgent creates per-user log dir: state/{agent}/logs/{userId}/ ✓
stderrLog points to per-user path: logs/{userId}/stderr.log ✓
Log directory created with mode 0o700 ✓

items.name: Security model documentation
validation: Covers all 8 security layers: env safety, URL safety, credentials, egress, content, tool ACL, auth, isolation ✓
Documents threat model (prompt injection, SSRF, credential leakage, lateral movement, DNS rebinding) ✓
Data flow diagram showing request path through security layers ✓
Links to related docs (agent-security, credentials, sandbox, configuration) ✓
